name: Courtyard of Villafranca Castle
description: An exclusive invitation to the ancestral home of the Caro family. Nocturnal concerts under dim lighting in the director's private residence.
long_description: The Castle-Palace of the Marquises of Villafranca is not a mere monumental location or a rented space; it represents an incalculable legacy. Transmitted in an uninterrupted family heritage since the 15th century, it was the residence of the brilliant pianist Marita Caro, mother of Pedro Halffter, and currently constitutes the private residence of the director and composer himself. By crossing its doors, the spectator enters the intimacy of our home, transforming the fortress into an active emotional participant.

Under a captivating and dim twilight illumination, the courtyard hosts nocturnal concerts at 21:30 h. The attendees, far from being mere spectators, become privileged guests in the family bosom, eliminating the traditional distance between the stage and the audience. With a capacity strictly limited to 300 seats, the seats will be occupied strictly on a first-come, first-served basis, allowing the acoustics and the weight of centuries of family heritage to merge into an unrepeatable musical experience.
address: Calle del Castillo, s/n, 24500 Villafranca del Bierzo (León)
